$note: Golden cases for the CV Patch Engine (eval:patch). Each runs cv_skills + jd_requirements through the REAL SkillNormalizer → SkillDiffService, overlays a fixture ledger + a CanonicalCvDocument (cv_projects), then asserts decorateWithPatch produces the expected action_type / rewrite_eligible / has_before. Offline, 0 LLM. Honesty core: has_before=true ONLY for an evidence-backed rewrite whose anchor resolves to a real bullet.

cv_projects.name: Booking App
bullets: Tối ưu truy vấn với SQL giảm 30% thời gian phản hồi

cases.rationale: SQL int<adv → partial; demonstrated in a project → deepen_wording (rewrite). The project bullet mentions SQL → anchor resolves → a real `before` is emitted (the only has_before=true case).

Same rewrite action, but NO project bullet mentions SQL → anchor_confidence low → has_before=false (never guesses a bullet). Still rewrite_eligible (the on-demand rewrite dialog lets the user pick the bullet).
Kubernetes absent → missing_required (fixability learn). Advise-only: never rewrite_eligible, never a before (would be fabrication).
React matched (adv>=int) but only listed in Skills → add_evidence (prove it with a bullet). No demonstrated bullet exists → no before, not rewrite_eligible.
